notableEvents.label: Samad Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samad Taylor grounds out, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts plunked
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts hit by pitch. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Miguel Andujar to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Ty France. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Alec Bohm out at 1st.
